description: Worktree-per-task isolation + merge-back. **PARTIAL (2026-06-02, verified vs disk):** the core shipped via the Stratum substrate GSD-2 wired — the gsd `execute` step (`pipelines/gsd.stratum.yaml`) runs `isolation: worktree` + `capture_diff: true` + `merge: sequential_apply` + `retries: 2`, and `ship_gsd` runs the project test suite + build pre-commit. So worktree-per-task isolation, diff capture, sequential merge-to-base, teardown, and conflict-detect-with-retry are DONE (Stratum `worktree.py`/`parallel_exec.py`; worktrees at `~/.stratum/worktrees/<flow>/<task>`, not `.compose/gsd/<task-id>/`). **Residual carried by COMP-PAR-MERGE-QUEUE:** (1) per-task *pre-merge* lint/build/test gating on each task's diff (today the project gates run once at `ship_gsd`, post-all-merges; per-task is only TaskResult cert/ensure); (2) conflict→bounce that feeds merge-conflict context to the re-dispatched agent (today `retries` re-runs blind). See ROADMAP.md 2026-06-02 reconciliation log.
